text:
The vehicle was found to be loaded with fireworks. One guard was injured. Roughly 140 children and staff members at the temple’s preschool were safely evacuated.
U.S. officials called it a targeted act of violence against the Jewish community.
Hwaida Saad contributed reporting from Beirut.
title: Iran War Live Updates: ‘No Guarantees’ Oil Prices Drop Soon, U.S. Official Says
